name: Theme Factory
description: Style claude.ai artifacts with 10 professionally designed pre-set themes (e.g., Arctic Frost, Midnight Galaxy, Ocean Depths, Desert Rose) or generate fully custom themes on-the-fly based on user descriptions. Each theme specifies a complete design system including color palette, typography, spacing, and visual identity. A reference theme showcase PDF is included.

findings_summary.notes: Official Anthropic skill from anthropics/skills repository. Contains SKILL.md, 10 pre-built theme markdown files, a theme showcase PDF, and Apache-2.0 LICENSE.txt. Verified at skills/theme-factory/ in the repo tree.

status_cleared.reason: SM cleanup: only full_pipeline pass is real pass. Needs re-verification.
